schemas.user module¶

User Schemas Module¶

This module defines Pydantic models for user-related data validation, authentication tokens, and password reset requests.

class schemas.user.RequestEmail(*, email: EmailStr)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Simple schema for operations requiring only an email address.

email¶

The targeted email address.

Type:

EmailStr

email: EmailStr¶
model_config = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class schemas.user.RequestResetEmail(*, email: EmailStr)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Schema for requesting a password reset email.

email¶

The email address where the reset link will be sent.

Type:

EmailStr

email: EmailStr¶
model_config = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class schemas.user.ResetPassword(*, token: str, new_password: Annotated[str, MinLen(min_length=6), MaxLen(max_length=255)])[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Schema for setting a new password using a reset token.

token¶

The verification token received via email.

Type:

str

new_password¶

The new password (6-255 characters).

Type:

str

model_config = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

new_password: str¶
token: str¶
class schemas.user.TokenSchema(*, access_token: str, refresh_token: str, token_type: str = 'bearer')[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Schema for authentication tokens returned after login.

access_token¶

JWT access token for API authorization.

Type:

str

refresh_token¶

Token used to obtain a new access token.

Type:

str

token_type¶

Type of the token, defaults to ‘bearer’.

Type:

str

access_token: str¶
model_config = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

refresh_token: str¶
token_type: str¶
class schemas.user.UserResponse(*, id: int, username: str, email: EmailStr, avatar: str | None, role: UserRole, confirmed: bool = False, created_at: datetime)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Schema for user data returned in API responses (Output).

id¶

Database primary key.

Type:

int

username¶

The user’s display name.

Type:

str

email¶

The user’s email address.

Type:

EmailStr

avatar¶

URL to the user’s avatar image.

Type:

Optional[str]

role¶

Access level assigned to the user.

Type:

UserRole

confirmed¶

Whether the email address has been verified.

Type:

bool

created_at¶

The timestamp of account creation.

Type:

datetime

avatar: str | None¶
confirmed: bool¶
created_at: datetime¶
email: EmailStr¶
id: int¶
model_config = {'from_attributes': True}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

role: UserRole¶
username: str¶
class schemas.user.UserSchema(*, username: Annotated[str, MinLen(min_length=3), MaxLen(max_length=50)], email: EmailStr, password: Annotated[str, MinLen(min_length=6), MaxLen(max_length=255)])[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Schema for user registration (Input).

username¶

Desired display name (3-50 characters).

Type:

str

email¶

Valid email address for the account.

Type:

EmailStr

password¶

Raw password string (6-255 characters).

Type:

str

email: EmailStr¶
model_config = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

password: str¶
username: str¶
